Package ru.nsu.kiryushin

Class Snake

java.lang.Object
ru.nsu.kiryushin.Snake
public class Snake extends Object
Snake entity: body segments, movement, and growth logic.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Snake(Point startPosition)
    Creates a snake with a single segment at the given start position, facing right.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Collection<Point>
    getBody()
    Returns a read-only view of the body ordered head-to-tail.
    Direction
    getDirection()
    Returns the current movement direction.
    Point
    getHead()
    Returns the head position.
    int
    getLength()
    Returns the number of body segments.
    void
    grow()
    Schedules the snake to grow by one segment on the next move() call.
    void
    move()
    Advances the snake one cell in the current direction.
    void
    setDirection(Direction newDirection)
    Changes the movement direction, ignoring reversal into the opposite direction.
    void
    shrink()
    Removes the tail segment immediately; does nothing when the snake is only one cell long.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Snake

      public Snake(Point startPosition)
      Creates a snake with a single segment at the given start position, facing right.
      Parameters:
      startPosition - initial head position

  • Method Details

    • move

      public void move()
      Advances the snake one cell in the current direction. If grow() was called beforehand, the tail is not removed.

    • setDirection

      public void setDirection(Direction newDirection)
      Changes the movement direction, ignoring reversal into the opposite direction.
      Parameters:
      newDirection - requested direction

    • grow

      public void grow()
      Schedules the snake to grow by one segment on the next move() call.

    • shrink

      public void shrink()
      Removes the tail segment immediately; does nothing when the snake is only one cell long.

    • getDirection

      public Direction getDirection()
      Returns the current movement direction.
      Returns:
      current direction

    • getHead

      public Point getHead()
      Returns the head position.
      Returns:
      head cell

    • getBody

      public Collection<Point> getBody()
      Returns a read-only view of the body ordered head-to-tail.
      Returns:
      unmodifiable body collection

    • getLength

      public int getLength()
      Returns the number of body segments.
      Returns:
      body length
